steps.title: Use the explanation clue
steps.content: The passage says Miyazaki presents fantasy elements with little backstory or explanation. The blank must therefore mean that he does not provide many details or much exposition about those fantasy elements.

steps.title: Reject opposite verbs
steps.content: Choice A would mean praising details and exposition. Choice B would mean merging them with something else. Choice C would mean creating details and exposition, not holding them back. The answer is D.
